learn_subheading: Master your typing sequence with guided curriculum modules specifically tailored to your preferred dialect and hardware structure.
learn_unlock_test_desc: Unlock this strict evaluation node verifying your mastery over all preceding mechanics to advance.
learn_stage_1_desc: Master the resting position for ultimate typing efficiency.
learn_stage_2_desc: Combine primary fingers to drill cross-key bigrams.
learn_stage_3_desc: Expand your reach to the top alpha row.
learn_stage_4_desc: Learn the lower reaches for complete alpha mastery.
learn_stage_5_desc: Real words, endurance blocks, and ultimate flow.
adaptive_banner_body: You have {count} {count, plural, one {key} other {keys}} below mastery:
progress_subheading: Track your speed, accuracy, streaks, and key-level mastery.
progress_sign_in_heading: Sign in to see your progress
progress_sign_in_body: Track your WPM, accuracy, and streak. Your data is saved when you sign in.
progress_weakness_body: Keys highlighted in red need more practice
progress_weakness_empty: Complete more lessons so we can identify which keys need attention.
progress_weakness_drill_desc: Practice these with a targeted adaptive drill.
progress_sessions_empty: No sessions yet. Start your first lesson →
progress_no_sessions_hint: Complete a lesson to start tracking your WPM.
lesson_test_passed_body: Stage cleared. You've proven your mechanics.
lesson_cert_body: You've proven mastery and earned your official certificate.
lesson_retry_unlimited: ↻ Retries are unlimited — try again whenever you're ready.
lesson_retry_org_unlimited: ↻ Retries are unlimited for your organisation.
lesson_retry_cooldown: Your institution requires a {hours}h cooldown between attempts.
lesson_cooldown_body: Your institution has set a {hours}h cooldown between placement test attempts.
lesson_cooldown_hint: Use this time to practise with regular lessons and drill your weak keys.
lesson_focus_hint: Click here or start typing to begin
lesson_cooldown_advice: Practice other lessons while you wait.
lesson_start_hint: Press any key to start typing
practice_sandbox_desc: Freeform typing simulation. Submitting tracks grants active backend XP profiles without unlocking Curriculum states. Select your drill sequence below.
practice_mode_words_desc: Practice common words pulled natively from localized arrays.
practice_mode_literature_desc: Practice pacing using heavy formatting loaded from public domain excerpts.
practice_logged: Your session has been logged to your daily streak.
practice_clock_paused: Clock paused — tap any key to resume
practice_analyzing_keys: Analyzing your weak keys and composing a custom multilingual sequence using Kimi AI.
practice_no_classics: No native-language classics available yet — showing English works instead.
error_subheading: We couldn't load this page. Please try again.
error_404_description: We couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved or doesn't exist.
error_generic_description: We encountered an unexpected error ({status}). Our team has been notified.
settings_subtitle: Preferences are saved automatically to your browser.
settings_language_desc: Sets the default wordlist and auto-selects the matching keyboard layout.
settings_layout_desc: Drives the hand guide and key highlighting during lessons.
settings_keyboard_desc: Display the keyboard diagram while typing in lessons.
settings_sound_desc: Play a click on each keystroke.
settings_strict_desc: Prevents advancing on errors — you must type the correct key to continue.
settings_preview_desc: This is how your selected layout will appear during lessons.
footer_tagline: Forge your keystrokes. Master your craft.
mkt_page_title: TypingScholar — Master typing in any language
mkt_hero_subtitle: Adaptive AI. Every script. Every layout.
mkt_demo_auto_cycle: Auto-cycling — click a script above to jump
mkt_footer_tagline: Forge your keystrokes. Master your craft.
mkt_footer_desc: Engineered for accuracy. Built for the foundry. The definitive typing platform for modern explorers.
mkt_feature_ai_desc: Our neural engine identifies micro-stutters and recurring error patterns in your stroke sequence, generating custom drills to eliminate them.
mkt_feature_latency_desc: Input processing optimized at the kernel level. Every stroke is rendered before your key returns to its neutral state.
mkt_feature_global_desc: Full support for Latin, Arabic, Cyrillic, and CJK scripts with native layout emulation.
mkt_feature_school_desc: COPPA/GDPR compliant infrastructure with centralized teacher dashboards and automated grading curves.
mkt_every_language_desc: 29 languages across 6 regions, from Latin to Arabic to CJK. Type in your native script with adaptive AI guidance.
mkt_and_more: And more — 29 languages, 8 script families, 1 adaptive platform
mkt_placement_subtitle: A structured evolution through the kinetic arts of typing.
mkt_step_1_desc: Our 120-second kinetic analysis maps your current speed, posture, and error distribution.
mkt_step_2_desc: Artificial intelligence generates a unique "heat map" of your physical typing limitations.
mkt_step_3_desc: Dynamic content that shifts difficulty in real-time based on your momentary accuracy.
mkt_step_4_desc: Witness your evolution through high-density technical readouts and milestone certifications.
mkt_forged_subtitle: Scale your precision from solo typing to district-wide mastery.
mkt_copyright_full: © 2026 TYPINGSCHOLAR KINETIC FOUNDRY. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.
pricing_meta_description: Simple, transparent pricing for TypingScholar. Free forever, or unlock advanced features with Power User or School plans.
pricing_hero_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, no contracts.
pricing_feature_power_1: All 17+ languages (full CJK, Arabic, Hebrew, Devanagari, Thai...)
pricing_faq_switch_a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect at the start of the next billing cycle.
pricing_faq_free_limits_q: What happens when I hit the free limits?
pricing_faq_free_limits_a: Nothing — you just continue with the free tier. We never lock your data or stop you from using what you have.
pricing_faq_annual_q: Is there a discount for annual billing?
pricing_faq_annual_a: Power User annual billing is available at $79/year (save ~27%). School plans are available in flexible 90-day ($6/mo) and semester 180-day ($8/mo) billing cycles.
pricing_faq_school_licensing_a: School seats are licensed per active student per month. You can add/remove seats at any time and billing adjusts automatically.
onboarding_step1_desc: Select the language you want to practice typing in
onboarding_step2_desc: Choose the keyboard layout you use
onboarding_step3_desc: Unlock unlimited courses, tracking, and certification with a one-time lifetime license.
onboarding_step4_desc: Type the text below to assess your current skill level
onboarding_step5_desc: Based on your performance, we recommend the following starting level
onboarding_payment_disclaimer: Powered by Test. Do not enter real numbers.
onboarding_start_typing_hint: Start typing to begin — type as much as you like, then hit "Stop & See Results"
onboarding_clock_paused: Clock paused — tap any key to resume
onboarding_level_beginner: You're just starting out! We'll guide you through the fundamentals of touch typing, starting with home row keys and proper finger placement.
onboarding_level_intermediate: You have a solid foundation! We'll help you build speed and accuracy with more complex patterns and common words.
onboarding_level_advanced: Great typing skills! We'll challenge you with advanced techniques, special characters, and longer passages.
onboarding_level_expert: Excellent! You're already a proficient typist. We'll help you maintain your skills and tackle specialized content.
